steps.title: Identify the task
steps.content: The student needs to provide a specific example of a public service that Tecuautla is responsible for. The notes name one: water treatment. The correct choice must link Tecuautla to that specific service.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the right one
steps.content:
• "As a municipality, Tecuautla is responsible for providing water treatment to its residents.": Names Tecuautla and gives the specific public service (water treatment) from the notes — exactly what the task requires. ✓
  • "Tecuautla is one of 84 municipalities in Hidalgo providing public services to their communities.": Mentions public services only in the abstract; no specific service is named. ✗
  • "In 2020, the municipality of Tecuautla had a population of 9,086.": Population data has nothing to do with public services. ✗
  • "Tecuautla—a governmental region in the state of Hidalgo, Mexico—provides public services to its residents.": Like B, refers to public services generically without naming any specific example. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
